name: Green Chile Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Fry bacon in a skillet until crisp. Drain and reserve drippings.
2. Crumble the bacon and set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, combine cornmeal, salt, sugar, and baking soda.
4. Add milk and eggs to the bowl, stirring until blended.
5. Add onion, pimiento, corn, chili peppers, and bacon bits; mix well.
6. Grease a 10-inch cast iron skillet with some reserved bacon drippings.
7. Pour half of the cornmeal mixture into the pan.
8. Cover with the remaining cornmeal mixture.
9. Sprinkle the top with shredded cheddar cheese.
10. Bake at 350°F for 35 minutes or until a tester inserted in the center comes out clean.
